title: S33R Butterfly Paintings
description: Adds 18 new butterfly and insect themed paintings to Minecraft Java.
body:
Made a quick little mod to add some butterfly painting textures to the game~ Was inspired after seeing the butterfly textures in Mi's and eemie's Butterfly resourcepack for SV. There's also a resourcepack in my likes on Planet Minecraft that prompted me to finish this lol.


The paintings function as normal Minecraft paintings, and should integrate with that painting scroll mod to let you pick and choose which painting you place, which would be helpful as this mod adds mostly single block paintings.

 
Mod is for 1.16.5, 1.17.1, 1.8.2, and 1.19.2 for Java. Have fun o/

~ Seer
